headline: McKesson Closes Strategic Investment with Apollo Funds for Minority Interest in Medical-Surgical Solutions
summary: IRVING, Texas, June 02, 2026--McKesson Corporation (NYSE: MCK) announced today the successful completion of the previously announced minority ownership interest investment from funds managed by affiliates of Apollo ("Apollo Funds") in McKesson’s Medical-Surgical Solutions ("MMS") business on June 1, 2026. This transaction represents a key milestone in McKesson’s intention to separate MMS into an independent, publicly traded company, and positions the business for long-term growth.

raw.headline: McKesson Closes Strategic Investment with Apollo Funds for Minority Interest in Medical-Surgical Solutions
raw.summary: IRVING, Texas, June 02, 2026--McKesson Corporation (NYSE: MCK) announced today the successful completion of the previously announced minority ownership interest investment from funds managed by affiliates of Apollo ("Apollo Funds") in McKesson’s Medical-Surgical Solutions ("MMS") business on June 1, 2026. This transaction represents a key milestone in McKesson’s intention to separate MMS into an independent, publicly traded company, and positions the business for long-term growth.

headline: McKesson Announces Completion Of Previously-Announced $1.25B Minority Ownership Investment By Apollo Funds For 13% Of MCK Subsidiary Medical-Surgical Solutions
summary: Apollo Funds invested $1.25 billion in convertible preferred equity of MMS to acquire an approximately 13% interest in MMS. The transaction values MMS at approximately $13 billion total enterprise valuation. McKesson
